description_long: This sculpture depicts two human figures, one standing and the other seated on a roughly hewn stone base. The standing figure leans forward, gently placing their hands on the shoulders of the seated figure, who appears to be in a contemplative or vulnerable pose. Both figures are nude, with naturalistic anatomical details and expressive postures, suggesting a moment of comfort or connection. The surface of the sculpture is weathered, with some discoloration and patches of moss or lichen, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure. The stone base is irregular and textured, contrasting with the smoother forms of the figures. The overall composition conveys intimacy and emotional resonance between the two figures.
description: A weathered stone sculpture of two nude human figures, one standing and comforting the other who is seated on a rough stone base. The piece shows expressive, naturalistic details and signs of outdoor aging.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the standing figure and the seated figure's back, highlighting the rough stone base and the figures' postures.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying the standing figure leaning forward to comfort the seated figure, with both faces and upper bodies visible.
description_view_2: Oblique rear view focusing on the backs of both figures and the curvature of the stone base.
description_view_3: Side view showing the interaction between the figures, with the standing figure's arms extended toward the seated figure's shoulders.
attribute_subject_matter: two human figures in an intimate, comforting pose
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears to be installed outdoors, as indicated by weathering and patches of moss or lichen on its surface.
